categories.description: Engine API requests must reject malformed request bodies and invalid required arguments without surfacing a server error.

cases.input: POST /networks/create with a truncated JSON object
cases.expected: HTTP 400 with an invalid JSON message

cases.input: POST /networks/create with a JSON array body
cases.expected: HTTP 400 because JSON request bodies must be objects
HTTP 400 instead of exporting an empty image set
HTTP 200 with a clamped default limit, not a traceback

categories.description: Bundled input files must stay on documented syntax and reject pdocker-only or malformed grammar.

cases.input: A Dockerfile containing WAT echo nope
cases.expected: The standard Dockerfile verifier rejects WAT

cases.input: A Dockerfile containing PDOCKER_RUN echo nope
cases.expected: The standard Dockerfile verifier rejects pdocker-specific syntax

cases.input: A feature scenario ledger missing a required area
cases.expected: The scenario ledger verifier fails before tests are considered complete

categories.description: Numeric and boundary-sensitive inputs must reject impossible values and record edge coverage.

cases.input: A storage snapshot with negative SharedLayerBytes
cases.expected: The storage verifier rejects the snapshot

cases.input: A storage snapshot with FreeBytes greater than TotalBytes
cases.expected: The storage verifier rejects the snapshot

cases.input: A storage snapshot whose TotalBytes adds image views to unique bytes
cases.expected: The storage verifier rejects the snapshot as double counted
PATH_MAX, sockaddr_un.sun_path, exec argv/scratch, memory thresholds, uid/gid sentinels, and wait/signal status are declared

categories.description: Adversarial payloads must fail closed or stay bounded without root escape, daemon crash, or argv corruption.

cases.input: PUT archive tar members ../escape.txt, nested/../../escape.txt, and /tmp/escape.txt
cases.expected: BadRequest and no file written outside destination

cases.input: PUT archive symlink or hardlink entries to /etc/passwd or ../outside
cases.expected: BadRequest and no whiteout/state mutation is committed

cases.input: POST /system/operations with a bounded huge JSON Detail field
cases.expected: HTTP 2xx/4xx but never 5xx; daemon remains responsive after the request

cases.input: Long linker-style argv and many object arguments through direct exec rewrite
cases.expected: No fixed PATH_MAX argv buffer regression; exec argv/scratch limits remain declared
